mapper.select: select uu.drama_id as dramaId, d.title as title, d.cover_url as coverUrl, case when max(uu.item_type) = 1 then 'ALL' else 'SINGLE' end as unlockType, sum(case when uu.item_type = 2 then 1 else 0 end) as unlockCount from user_unlock uu left join drama d on uu.drama_id = d.id where uu.user_id = #{userId} group by uu.drama_id, d.title, d.cover_url order by max(uu.create_time) desc
